visual.name: HistogramPro
visual.description: Professional histogram with configurable bins, outlier trimming, statistical overlays (mean, median, normal curve), and full style controls. Free tier includes 10 bins; Pro unlocks unlimited bins and advanced features.

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: Numeric field to plot as histogram

bins.description: Number of bins. Free tier is fixed at 10. Upgrade to Pro for 2–100.

trimLower.description: Trim bottom N% of values as outliers. Pro only.

trimUpper.description: Trim top N% of values as outliers. Pro only.

showNormal.description: Overlay a normal distribution curve. Pro only.

showStats.description: Show n, mean, median, σ, min, max panel. Pro only.
